commands.review_summary:
The PR renames the disabled plugin-inspector nightly workflow into a manual bulk-scan workflow, adds a main-push dispatcher for `@openclaw/plugin-inspector` pin bumps, and adds detector/workflow tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR changes CI automation rather than fixing a reproducible product bug. The source/tests give a clear static validation path for the detector, but not a live post-merge dispatch reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the PR has no blocking findings and should proceed through normal maintainer check and merge handling.

target.title: ci: dispatch plugin inspector scans on pin bumps
target.body:
## Summary
- Rename the disabled Plugin Inspector nightly workflow into a manual/pin-triggered bulk scan workflow.
- Add a post-merge dispatcher that detects merged `@openclaw/plugin-inspector` pin bumps in the root and CLI package manifests, then dispatches the bulk scan from `main`.
- Preserve manual dry-run scans and report artifact upload.

## Proof
```bash
bun run test -- src/__tests__/package-publish-workflow.test.ts scripts/github/plugin-inspector-pin-change.test.mjs
bun run format:check -- .github/workflows/plugin-inspector-bulk-scan.yml .github/workflows/plugin-inspector-pin-bump-dispatch.yml scripts/github/plugin-inspector-pin-change.mjs scripts/github/plugin-inspector-pin-change.test.mjs scripts/package-inspector-nightly-scan.ts src/__tests__/package-publish-workflow.test.ts
bun run ci:static
```

Autoreview:
```bash
AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 /Users/patrickerichsen/.codex/worktrees/8a8e/clawhub/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch
```

Result: fixed the accepted finding to include `packages/clawhub/package.json` pin bumps, reran focused tests/static, reran autoreview clean.

No UI changes in this PR.

## Linear
- CLAW-255
